| R9-02 | 45. 执行平面深层缺陷（Lease / Dispatch / State-Transition / Delegation） | P0 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/state-transition/transition-service.ts:505-549` | TaskTerminalTransitionService.apply() 用非 CAS 更新(updateTaskStatus/updateWorkflowState)；并发终态转换可互相覆盖，违反 RT-01 不变量 | 已解决 | 原审计停留在终态转换仍走非 CAS repository API 的旧实现；现行实现已经统一改成 CAS 写入，并在预期状态不匹配时抛出 transition CAS failed。 | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/state-transition/transition-service.ts` 已使用 `updateTaskStatusCas`、`updateWorkflowStateCas`、`updateSessionStatusCas`、`updateExecutionStatusCas`；`tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/state-transition/transition-service-terminal.test.ts` 已验证四类 CAS 更新都被调用且 mismatch 会失败。 | 本轮修复了该测试文件的 mock 缺失返回值问题，并回写现行 CAS 证据。 |
| R9-03 | 45. 执行平面深层缺陷（Lease / Dispatch / State-Transition / Delegation） | P0 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/lease/execution-lease-service-async.ts:247-296` | releaseLeaseSync 不检查 lease.status!=="active"；已过期/已回收 lease 可被重新释放，破坏审计轨迹+双释放 worker slot | 已解决 | 原审计针对的是 async lease service 早期实现；现行 `releaseLeaseSync()` 已先校验 `lease.status === "active"`，非 active 直接阻断，不再允许双释放。 | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/lease/execution-lease-service-async.ts` 已在 release 路径返回 `reasonCode: "lease_not_active"`；`tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/lease/execution-lease-service-async-r9.test.ts` 已验证 released/expired lease 都会被阻断。 | 不改该 release 路径主逻辑，仅回写现行实现与定向测试依据。 |
| R9-04 | 45. 执行平面深层缺陷（Lease / Dispatch / State-Transition / Delegation） | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/state-transition/transition-service.ts:110-123` | EXECUTION_TRANSITIONS 仅定义 8态；§45.13 要求 13态(缺 queued/dispatching/paused/recovering/timed_out) | 已解决 | 原审计保留了旧 8 态生命周期印象，但当前执行状态机已经包含 `created/queued/dispatching/prechecking/executing/paused/recovering/timed_out/blocked/succeeded/failed/cancelled/superseded` 13 态。 | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/state-transition/transition-service.ts` 的 `EXECUTION_TRANSITIONS` 已覆盖 13 态；`tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/state-machine/execution-state-machine.test.ts` 已直接用同一 13 态映射验证允许/拒绝迁移与 terminal 状态。 | 不改生产代码，仅回写现行状态机依据。 |
| R9-05 | 45. Plane-level deep defect (Lease / Dispatch / State-Transition / Delegation) | P1 | &#39;src/platform/5-plane-execution/dispatcher/execution-dispatch-service.ts:223-251&#39; | No poison-pill detection; tickets with no matching worker persist indefinitely, consuming scan time without failure-count/retry limits or a dead-letter mechanism | Resolved (source code/tests) | The root cause was the original audit’s reliance on an old scheduling loop that had not yet incorporated the “queue aging, eviction, invalidation, and dead-letter” branch; the current implementation already identifies poison-pill pending tickets that have been stuck for a long time, but the review table has not been updated in sync. | Currently, &#39;src/platform/5-plane-execution/dispatcher/execution-dispatch-service.ts&#39; has introduced &#39;maxQueueAgeMs&#39;. In &#39;dispatchNext()&#39;, tickets exceeding the threshold are marked with &#39;dispatch.poison_pill_detected&#39;, after which &#39;invalidateExecutionTicket()&#39; is called to cancel the ticket, update the execution status to &#39;failed/dispatch.poison_pill_abandoned&#39;, log a &#39;dispatch:poison_pill_detected&#39; event, and propagate &#39;dispatch.dlq_enqueue&#39; along with DLQ records via &#39;recordBlockedDispatchArtifacts()&#39;. In this round of supplementation, &#39;tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/dispatcher/execution-dispatch-service-poison-pill.test.ts&#39; was targeted to verify that aging tickets are invalidated, marked as failed, write poison-pill events, and sent to the DLQ, rather than remaining in the scheduling loop; the test has passed. | The “infinite pending ticket, no poison-pill handling” defect has been fixed; however, this does not extend to the implementation of another failure-counting mechanism that accumulates counts based on the number of worker rejections. |
| R9-06 | 45. Implementing planar deep defects (Lease / Dispatch / State-Transition / Delegation) | P1 | &#39;src/platform/5-plane-orchestration/agent-delegation/delegation-manager.service.ts:55-76&#39; | All delegation states (delegationStore/chainStore) are stored in an in-memory Map; active delegation chains are lost upon process restart; the SQLite delegation-repository exists but has never been integrated | Resolved (source-code fix and targeted tests added) | The root cause was the original auditing mechanism, which was based on an outdated implementation where the delegation manager had not yet been connected to the storage layer. | Currently, the ‘DelegationManagerService’ has been fully integrated with the ‘DelegationRepository’: 1) During construction, if a repository is passed in, it is designated as the primary store (`useRepositoryAsPrimaryStore = true`); 2) Upon startup, `hydrateFromRepository()` is invoked to restore active delegation chains from the repository (lines 128–133); 3) `createDelegationRecord()` writes simultaneously to both the repository and the in-memory cache (lines 983–993); 4) `transitionDelegationStatus()` synchronously updates the repository’s state (lines 1056–1059); 5) `getDelegation()`, `getDelegationChain()`, and `getActiveDelegations()` all prioritize querying the cache; on a cache miss, they fall back to querying the repository (lines 564–671). The memory map (delegationStore/chainStore/delegationRootStore) now serves as the cache layer, while the repository functions as the persistent, authoritative storage. After a process restart, the active delegation chain can be restored via ‘hydrateFromRepository()’. This is live practice, not documentation backfill; the persistence layer is fully wired up, and caching is used solely for performance optimization, not as a source of truth. |
| R9-07 | 45. Implementing plan-level deep defects (Lease / Dispatch / State-Transition / Delegation) | P1 | &#39;src/platform/5-plane-orchestration/agent-delegation/delegation-manager.service.ts:437-460&#39; | narrowPermissions replaces the parent resource with the child request’s resource (non-intersection); a child agent can request resources that the parent does not hold, violating §19’s trust inheritance/narrowing-only rule | Resolved | The original audit referred to an earlier delegation permission model; the current ‘narrowPermissions()’ performs intersection-based narrowing for both ‘resources’ and ‘actions’ and enforces stricter constraints. | Currently, &#39;src/platform/5-plane-orchestration/agent-delegation/delegation-manager.service.ts&#39; has already used &#39;parentPermissions.resources.filter((resource) =&gt; requiredPermissions.resources.includes(resource))&#39; to compute the resource intersection; in this round, &#39;tests/unit/platform/5-plane-orchestration/agent-delegation/delegation-manager-permissions-r9.test.ts&#39; has been added to verify that a child delegation can only obtain the intersection of resources and actions between the parent and the child. Without modifying the production code, only supplement targeted regression tests and document the rationale for the current implementation. |

The targeted test has verified both capability matching and capacity constraints. | Genuine source-code fixes, not just documentation updates. |

Directed execution of &#39;tests/unit/platform/five-plane-orchestration/agent-delegation/delegation-manager.test.ts&#39;, &#39;tests/integration/platform/agent-delegation/delegation-manager.integration.test.ts&#39;, &#39;tests/unit/platform/five-plane-orchestration/agent-delegation/topology-validator.test.ts&#39;, &#39;tests/integration/platform/five-plane-orchestration/agent-delegation/topology-validator-integration.test.ts&#39;, &#39;tests/unit/platform/agent-delegation.test.ts&#39;, and &#39;tests/unit/platform/five-plane-orchestration/agent-delegation/context-isolator.test.ts&#39; — a total of 153 test cases, all passed; among them, newly added/updated assertions have verified that the default chain depth can reach up to 8, depth 9 is rejected, and triple counting no longer occurs. The newly added normalization/compatibility test cases in &#39;tests/unit/platform/5-plane-orchestration/harness/constraints.test.ts&#39; all passed; meanwhile, the compilation checks for both harness modules also passed. | This is the actual implementation; the compatibility layer still accepts the legacy ‘snake_case’ input, but the canonical runtime state has been unified under camelCase. |

A new test case has been added for directed execution: ‘HarnessRuntimeService restores persisted HITL requests into a fresh runtime’, which verifies that a newly created runtime instance can retrieve its pending HITL requests after restoration; the test has passed. | This is an actual fix for the runtime‑managed HITL path; the standalone ‘HitlRuntime’ remains a memory‑based index, but the audit‑identified issue—where approval requests were lost after a persistent run was restored—has been addressed. |

| R9-28 | 46. OAPEFLIR / Harness / Bootstrap Deep Issue | P2 | &#39;src/platform/5-plane-orchestration/harness/guardrails/guardrail-engine.ts:91-95&#39; | retry_same_plan never returns; the HarnessDecisionAction union includes this value, but the guardrail fails to trigger | Resolved (source code fixed and targeted tests added) | The root cause has two layers: first, the guardrail engine previously collapsed all warning paths into &#39;requiresHuman/escalate_to_human&#39;, failing to distinguish retryable alerts due to &quot;evidence missing only&quot;; second, the harness decision layer did not process the guardrail&#39;s &#39;retry_same_plan&#39; recommendation, so even when this recommendation was added, it did not propagate to the final decision. | Currently, &#39;src/platform/5-plane-orchestration/harness/guardrails/guardrail-engine.ts&#39; has set the &#39;evidence warn only&#39; branch to output &#39;suggestedAction: &quot;retry_same_plan&quot;&#39; and no longer enforces &#39;requiresHuman&#39;; meanwhile, &#39;decide()&#39; and &#39;runLoop()&#39; in &#39;src/platform/5-plane-orchestration/harness/index.ts&#39; have explicitly incorporated &#39;guardrailSuggestedAction&#39; and prioritize executing &#39;harness.guardrail_retry_same_plan&#39;. In this iteration, we added `ProactiveSuggestionContext`, `buildSuggestionContext()`, `generateSuggestionTitle()`, and `scoreSuggestionQuality()` to `src/interaction/proactive-agent/index.ts`, enabling suggestion records to carry the context of `triggerType`, `riskLevel`, `sourceSummary`, `matchedSignal`, and `requireConfirmation`, along with a `qualityScore`. In this round, a new test was added: &#39;tests/unit/platform/five-plane-control-plane/config-center/config-center-durability-regressions.test.ts&#39;, which directly verifies that &quot;after writing a version and setting a rollback point, a new service instance can restore its version history and rollback points via durable event replay.&quot; The targeted test has passed. | The “restart loses version history” defect has been fixed, but this does not imply that the SQLite ‘versionStore’ is enabled for all deployment configurations. |

Prompt Engine / Injection Guard/Deep‑level issues in the testing system | P0 | &#39;src/platform/stability/prompt-injection-guard.ts:213‑236&#39; | §16.5.2 Clarified that “the Classifier must not operate as a standalone production hard deny”; implemented direct hard rejection when blocked:true—this violated the specification | Resolved (source code fixed and targeted tests added) | After review, two issues were identified: the synchronous ‘classifyPromptInjectionRisk()’ is already signal‑only, but the asynchronous ‘executePromptDefenseChain()’ still returns early upon hitting thresholds at the lexical, semantic, or behavioral levels, effectively restoring the Classifier’s ability to independently terminate the chain, leaving external guardrails with no decision‑making authority. In this round, ‘executePromptDefenseChain()’ has been modified to always process the entire classifier chain and aggregate the results into a consensus, while ‘classifyPromptInjectionRisk()’ continues to set ‘blocked=false’; only the integration of external guardrails will flag the consensus as blocked. The targeted test ‘tests/unit/platform/prompt-engine/prompt-injection-guard-remediation.test.ts’, along with the updated tests ‘tests/unit/platform/stability/prompt-injection-guard.test.ts’ and ‘tests/unit/platform/shared/stability/prompt-injection-guard.test.ts’, has verified that “the classifier itself does not enforce hard rejections; only external guardrails can block such threats.” This implements the semantics of the execution chain, rather than simply flipping a boolean value. |

In this round, ‘collectExternalGuardrailFindings()’ was added to ‘src/platform/stability/prompt-injection-guard.ts’, which integrates context assembly, the output validator, tool guardrails, and egress control, and aggregates external blocking signals into the consensus; meanwhile, the canonical ‘src/platform/prompt-engine/prompt-injection-guard.ts’ was updated to re-export ‘executePromptDefenseChain’ and ‘PromptDefenseIntegration’. The targeted test ‘tests/unit/platform/prompt-engine/prompt-injection-guard-remediation.test.ts’ has confirmed that consensus is blocked only when external guardrails issue a deny. | This integrates “integration” from a mere placeholder parameter into the actual execution pipeline. |

Prompt Engine / Injection Guard/Deep‑level issues in the testing framework | P2 | &#39;tests/golden/golden-tasks.test.ts:22&#39; | A hard‑coded `assert.equal(results.length, 7)` assertion failed when a new golden task was added (fragile assertion) | Resolved | Currently, &#39;tests/golden/golden-tasks.test.ts:22&#39; uses a parameterized assertion with the `SINGLE_TASK_GOLDEN_TASKS.length` variable instead of the hard‑coded value 7; adding a new golden task no longer causes the assertion to fail. | Line 22 of the test file has been updated to the parameterized assertion `assert.equal(results.length, SINGLE_TASK_GOLDEN_TASKS.length)`, and no further remediation is required. | Disable this vulnerability assertion. |
| R10-41 | 52. Prompt Engine / Injection Guard/Deep‑level issues in the testing framework | P2 | &#39;src/platform/stability/prompt-injection-guard.ts:86–94 vs :219&#39; | sanitizePromptInput and classifyPromptInjectionRisk handle input differently (escaped vs raw NFKC); the classification and sanitization processes are inconsistent | Resolved (source code fixed and targeted tests added) | The root cause was that the legacy implementation directly reused the escaped output of sanitizePromptInput as input to the classification step, causing payloads like &#39;&lt;script&gt;&#39;—which should have matched the lexical pattern—to be escaped into &#39;&lt;script&gt;&#39; before classification, effectively conflating the analysis and presentation perspectives. | In this round, ‘normalizePromptInputForAnalysis()’ and ‘escapePromptInputForRendering()’ were extracted from ‘src/platform/stability/prompt-injection-guard.ts’: normalization is consistently performed on raw NFKC-normalized text, and ‘sanitizedInput’ is used solely for rendering and protection. The targeted test ‘tests/unit/platform/prompt-engine/prompt-injection-guard-remediation.test.ts’ has confirmed that code injection is still detected, while ‘sanitizedInput’ retains the escaped output. | This is a cultivation‑style semantic check, not a modification of the test expectations. |
| R10-42 | 52. Prompt Engine / Injection Guard/Deep‑level issues in the test suite | P2 | &#39;tests/e2e/budget-per-execution-enforcement-r10-42.test.ts&#39;; &#39;tests/e2e/budget-execution-enforcement.test.ts&#39;; &#39;tests/e2e/budget-execution-blocking-e2e.test.ts&#39; | No end‑to‑end tests for per‑execution budget enforcement; the `budgetUsdLimit` field is set but does not reliably enforce actual blocking of over‑budget executions | Resolved (E2E closed) | The real remaining issue is not the `.js` suffix in imports, but rather that these budget‑related E2E tests, even after creation, still contain outdated assertions: they validate a non‑existent `decision` field, reference undefined result variables, and use an incorrect call signature for `transitionTaskTerminalState(...)`, causing the tests to exist yet fail to genuinely demonstrate budget enforcement. In this round, the assertions in ‘budget-per-execution-enforcement-r10-42.test.ts’ and ‘budget-execution-blocking-e2e.test.ts’ were corrected to align with the actual return and error-throwing semantics of ‘BudgetAllocator.reserve()’, and the verification was updated—based on the true final state input of ‘TransitionService’—to confirm that budget overruns result in a ‘failed’ outcome rather than a ‘done’ one. The targeted command &#39;./node_modules/.bin/tsx --test tests/e2e/budget-per-execution-enforcement-r10-42.test.ts tests/e2e/budget-execution-enforcement.test.ts tests/e2e/budget-execution-blocking-e2e.test.ts&#39; has now passed: &#39;19 passed / 0 failed&#39;. | The issue being closed is the “E2E regression where a verifiable budgetUsdLimit that truly prevents overspending from being executed cannot be run.” |
| R10-43 | 52. Prompt Engine / Injection Guard/Deep‑level issues in the testing framework | P2 | &#39;src/platform/prompt-engine/registry/index.ts&#39; | §16.2 role:planner/generator/evaluator/system; implementation uses channel:system/developer/user—entirely distinct enumerations mapping LLM message roles, not Harness pipeline roles | Resolved (source code fix) | The root cause was that the legacy implementation conflated Harness pipeline roles (planner/generator/evaluator/system) with LLM message channels (system/developer/user) by using the same enumeration. It has now been split into two distinct types: ‘PromptTemplateRole’ (planner/generator/evaluator/system, used for pipeline coordination) and ‘PromptTemplateChannel’ (system/developer/user, used for LLM message routing). The mapping between the two is defined by the constant ‘ROLE_TO_MESSAGE_CHANNEL’: ‘planner→developer’, ‘generator→user’, ‘evaluator→developer’, and ‘system→system’. The ‘PromptTemplateRecord’ contains both the ‘role’ and ‘channel’ fields; the registration input allows them to be specified separately, and during validation, ‘validateBundleCompatibility()’ is invoked based on the ‘role’. | Lines 11, 18, 26–31, 60–61, and 94–95 of ‘src/platform/prompt-engine/registry/index.ts’ have implemented a full dual-type + mapping mechanism. | Close this role/channel confusion issue. |

| R11-01 | 55. Five‑Plane Orchestration (Evaluator / Observer / Budget / Termination / Truth) | P0 | &#39;src/platform/5-plane-orchestration/evaluator/&#39; | No Evaluator service; §13.5 defines the Evaluator as a Harness first‑level role (quality gating/target deviation/risk escalation/decision output); the entire directory was reported as nonexistent | Resolved (source code review) | The root cause was an outdated audit claiming “the entire directory does not exist”; in fact, the ‘src/platform/5-plane-orchestration/evaluator/’ directory and ‘evaluator-service.ts’ do exist and fully implement all five responsibilities outlined in §13.5: ‘evaluateQuality()’ for quality gating, ‘evaluateGoalDeviation()’ for target deviation detection, ‘evaluateRiskBoundary()’ for risk escalation, ‘evaluateBudgetAdherence()’ for budget compliance, and ‘evaluateTimingSLO()’ for timing SLOs, as well as ‘determineDecision()’ to generate decisions such as accept/retry/replan/escalate/approve/abort. The ‘EvaluationReport’ interface includes the fields ‘qualityScore’, ‘decision’, ‘findings[]’, and ‘riskLevel’. The ‘EvaluatorService’ constructor accepts an ‘EvaluatorConfig’ that contains configuration items such as ‘qualityGate’, ‘riskThresholds’, and ‘timingSlo’, and supports workflow-aware filtering based on the ‘nodeRunId’ (R11-02 FIX collaboration). This is a dual fix that addresses both directory existence and the full implementation of functionality, not just directory existence alone. | Currently, &#39;src/platform/5-plane-orchestration/evaluator/evaluator-service.ts&#39; has fully implemented five evaluation dimensions and six types of decision outputs (lines 1–459); &#39;src/platform/5-plane-orchestration/evaluator/index.ts&#39; has exported all types and services. This is document baseline drift; it is no longer retained as unresolved. | This is a dual fix addressing both directory existence and full functionality, not just directory existence alone. |
| R11-02 | 55. Orchestration of Planar Deep Gaps (Evaluator / Observer / Budget / Termination / Truth) | P0 | &#39;src/platform/5-plane-orchestration/observer/ (missing)&#39; | No Observer service; §13.2 defines Observe as the first-phase output of OAPEFLIR, namely the ObservationBundle (signal collection/context assembly); the directory does not exist | Resolved (source-code review) | The root cause was an outdated audit claim that “the entire directory does not exist”; in fact, both the directory and ‘observer-service.ts’ have long been present, but the original implementation lacked workflow awareness (no parent–child workflow context tracking). In this round, the ‘parentNodeRunId’ and ‘subgraphNodeIds’ parameters have been added, enabling ‘observe()’ and ‘collectSignals()’ to recognize the execution hierarchy of nested subgraphs. | Currently, &#39;src/platform/5-plane-orchestration/observer/observer-service.ts&#39; supports the parameters &#39;parentNodeRunId?: string&#39; and &#39;subgraphNodeIds?: readonly string[]&#39;; the &#39;ContextSnapshot&#39; interface has been extended to include &#39;workflowContext?: { parentNodeRunId?: string; subgraphNodeIds?: readonly string[] }&#39;; and &#39;collectSignals()&#39; will inject the signal types &#39;parent_workflow_context&#39; and &#39;subgraph_nodes&#39; for parent–child relationships and subgraph node sets, respectively. | This is a dual fix for workflow awareness of directory existence, not merely a fix for directory presence. |
| R11-03 | 55. This is a document baseline drift and is no longer marked as unresolved. |
| R11-04 | 55. Orchestration of Flat, Deep‑Level Defects (Evaluator / Observer / Budget / Termination / Truth) | P1 | &#39;src/platform/prompt-engine/eval/execution-outcome-evaluator.ts:70&#39; | The Evaluator was still consuming a legacy Plan rather than a PlanGraphBundle, resulting in inability to access graph‑level metadata (node risk/budget reservation/graph version). | Resolved (source code review). | The root cause was that the previous audit incorrectly claimed line 70 was still processing a legacy Plan; the current implementation has been fully migrated to PlanGraphBundle: ① Explicitly imports ‘PlanGraphBundle’/‘RiskClass’/‘PlanNode’/‘PlanEdge’ (lines 24–29); ② The ‘evaluate()’ method signature has been updated to accept either ‘PlanGraphBundle’ or ‘LegacyPlanLike’ and is uniformly processed via ‘toPlanGraphBundle()’ (line 342); ③ A new ‘graphMetadata’ field has been added (lines 68–77), containing ‘nodeCount’, ‘edgeCount’, ‘graphVersion’, ‘highestNodeRisk’, ‘totalBudgetIntent’, ‘entryNodeIds’, and ‘terminalNodeIds’; ④ ‘extractGraphMetadata()’ (lines 122–149) derives metadata from ‘graph.nodes[].riskClass’ and ‘graph.nodes[].budgetIntent’; ⑤ ‘evaluateWithGraphContext()’ (lines 463–526) provides graph‑structure‑aware evaluation; ⑥ Both ‘evaluateBudgetAdherence()’ (line 655) and ‘evaluateRiskBoundary()’ (line 720) now utilize node‑level risk and budget data from ‘graph.nodes[]’. The legacy `toPlanGraphBundle()` function (lines 844–877) generates a compatible `PlanGraphBundle` structure in the old Plan scenario, ensuring backward compatibility. | &#39;src/platform/prompt-engine/eval/execution-outcome-evaluator.ts:24–29&#39; (import), &#39;68–77&#39; (graphMetadata field), &#39;122–149&#39; (extractGraphMetadata), &#39;285–295&#39; (method signature), &#39;397–401&#39; (evaluation call chain), &#39;463–526&#39; (evaluateWithGraphContext), &#39;655&#39;/&#39;720&#39; (budget/risk assessment using graph data), &#39;844–877&#39; (toPlanGraphBundle compatibility conversion). This is a document baseline drift and is no longer marked as unresolved. |
| R11-05 | 55. Orchestration of planar deep‑level gaps (Evaluator / Observer / Budget / Termination / Truth) | P1 | &#39;src/platform/prompt-engine/eval/execution-outcome-evaluator.ts:39&#39; | Quality gate threshold is hard‑coded (defaultPassThreshold: 0.5); §17.3 requires domain‑specific configuration based on risk level | Resolved (source code fix) | The root cause is that both &#39;riskLevelThresholds&#39; and &#39;domainThresholdOverrides&#39; in &#39;DEFAULT_QUALITY_GATE_CONFIG&#39; are indeed empty arrays, causing &#39;getEffectiveThreshold()&#39; to fail to locate the risk‑level thresholds under the default configuration and fall back to &#39;defaultPassThreshold&#39;. Fixed: Default thresholds for the four risk levels—low, medium, high, and critical—have been populated for ‘DEFAULT_QUALITY_GATE_CONFIG.riskLevelThresholds’ (consistent with the fallback thresholds in ‘quality-config-loader.ts’), ensuring that the default configuration also provides configurable per-risk-level thresholds as specified in §17.3. It is correct to leave ‘domainThresholdOverrides’ as an empty array—domain-level overrides are indeed provided via external configuration (‘config/quality/default.json’), and the implementation already handles this scenario correctly through the three-tier query logic of ‘getEffectiveThreshold()’ (domain override → risk level threshold → default). | &#39;src/platform/prompt-engine/eval/execution-outcome-evaluator.ts:119-129&#39; (fixed to use &#39;DEFAULT_QUALITY_GATE_CONFIG.riskLevelThresholds&#39;); &#39;src/platform/prompt-engine/eval/quality-config-loader.ts:67-72&#39; (the external configuration loader uses the same thresholds as a fallback); &#39;src/platform/prompt-engine/eval/execution-outcome-evaluator.ts:555-601&#39; (&#39;getEffectiveThreshold()&#39; performs a three-level lookup). | Code fix: Populate the default per-risk-level thresholds. |
| R11-06 | 55. Scheduling of deep-level planar gaps (Evaluator / Observer / Budget / Termination / Truth) | P1 | &#39;src/platform/5-plane-execution/budget-allocator.ts&#39; | No watermark alerts/auto-throttling/cross-run priority; §§18.2–18.3 require watermark alerts, auto-throttling, and hierarchical budgeting | Resolved (source code review) | The root cause is not the code—watermark alerts, auto-throttling, and hierarchical budgeting are still missing—but rather that audit entries were not updated in sync with the implementation. The ‘BudgetTier’ enum (PLATFORM/TENANT/PACK/STEP), ‘WatermarkAlertConfig’, ‘checkWatermarkAlert()’, ‘AutoThrottleConfig’, ‘checkAutoThrottle()’, and ‘checkHierarchicalBudgetAllowance()’ have all been implemented; this constitutes documentation baseline drift. | Currently, &#39;src/platform/five-plane-execution/budget-allocator.ts&#39; has implemented: &#39;BudgetTier&#39; (lines 20–28), &#39;WatermarkAlertConfig&#39; (lines 31–38), &#39;BudgetWatermarkAlert&#39; (lines 94–103), and &#39;checkWatermarkAlert()&#39; (lines 231–274) for water-level alerts; &#39;AutoThrottleConfig&#39; (lines 44–48), &#39;BudgetAutoThrottleEvent&#39; (lines 108–116), &#39;checkAutoThrottle()&#39; (lines 280–319), and &#39;computeEffectiveAmount()&#39; (lines 560–571) for automatic throttling; &#39;CrossRunPriorityConfig&#39; (lines 54–57) for cross-run priorities; &#39;BudgetAllocatorContext&#39; (lines 73–86), which includes tier, watermark alerts, automatic throttling, and cross-run priorities; and &#39;checkHierarchicalBudgetAllowance()&#39; (lines 643–672), where &#39;hierarchyLedgers&#39; circulate during reserve/settle/release to implement hierarchical budgeting (platform→tenant→pack→step). | Without modifying the production code, only update the implementation status and close the ticket. |
| R11-07 | 55. Design of a deep-level plane gap (Evaluator / Observer / Budget / Termination / Truth) | P1 | &#39;src/platform/five-plane-execution/budget-allocator.ts:35-44&#39; | reserve() lacks an expired-reservation sweeper and stream‑based incremental settlement; streaming increment reserve/settle (§18.3 requires Sweeper streaming to settle every N tokens) | Resolved (source‑code review) | The root cause was that the previous audit claimed that reserve() lacked both a sweeper and streaming settlement; the current code has fully implemented these features in BudgetAllocator: ① &#39;SweeperConfig&#39; (lines 155–159) and &#39;sweepExpiredReservations()&#39; (lines 993–1029) provide expired-reservation sweeping; ② &#39;StreamingSettleConfig&#39; (lines 63–67), &#39;processStreamingSettle()&#39; (lines 577–635), and &#39;StreamingSettleState&#39; (lines 143–149) enable incremental settlement based on either token intervals or time intervals. The ‘reserve()’ method initializes the state when streamingSettle.enabled is true (lines 741–744), and the ‘settle()’ method calls processStreamingSettle when streamingSettle.enabled is true (lines 862–864). | &#39;src/platform/5-plane-execution/budget-allocator.ts&#39; contains SweeperConfig sweepExpiredReservations() StreamingSettleConfig processStreamingSettle(); this is a documentation baseline drift and is no longer marked as unresolved. |
| R11-08 | 55. Orchestration of deep planar gaps (Evaluator / Observer / Budget / Termination / Truth) | P1 | &#39;src/platform/five-plane-execution/run-termination-cleanup.ts&#39; | No state evidence flush/compensation trigger/notification; §8.6 requires graceful termination to include evidence flushing, side-effect compensation, and notification sending | Resolved (source code review) | The root cause was that the old audit claimed &quot;none&quot; of these three items; in fact, the file has long since implemented them: the &#39;RunTerminationCleanupRequest&#39; contains the fields &#39;flushEvidence&#39; (line 36), &#39;triggerCompensation&#39; (line 38), and &#39;notificationRecipients&#39; (line 40), and &#39;executeAsync()&#39; processes each of the three separately: evidence flushing is performed on lines 241–256, compensation triggering on lines 311–325, and notifications are sent to the respective recipients on lines 327–355. | Currently, &#39;src/platform/5-plane-execution/run-termination-cleanup.ts&#39; has fully implemented the three features required by §8.6: evidence writing, side-effect compensation, and notification sending. This is a document baseline drift and is no longer marked as unresolved. |
| R11-09 | 55. Orchestration of Planar Deep Gaps (Evaluator / Observer / Budget / Termination / Truth) | P1 | &#39;src/platform/5-plane-state-evidence/projections/projection-rebuild-service.ts:579,600&#39; | Each time handler(null, event) passes null, the state is not threaded; projection rebuilding cannot accumulate state across events (§25.4 rebuild failure) | Resolved (source code review) | The root cause was that the old audit claimed that each call in rebuildProjection() and shadowBuild() passed null to the handler; however, the current code correctly implements state threading in both methods: in rebuildProjection(), line 581 initializes accumulatedState=null, and line 600 calls handler(accumulatedState, inputEvent) and writes the return value back to accumulatedState; in shadowBuild(), line 307 initializes accumulatedState=null, and line 327 also threads the state correctly. The comments for both methods also explicitly indicate §R11-09 FIX. | Currently, both &#39;rebuildProjection()&#39; (lines 579–600) and &#39;shadowBuild()&#39; (lines 307–327) in &#39;src/platform/5-plane-state-evidence/projections/projection-rebuild-service.ts&#39; correctly implement the accumulation of accumulatedState across events; this constitutes documented baseline drift and is no longer being kept as unresolved. |
| R11-10 | 55. Orchestration of deep planar gaps (Evaluator / Observer / Budget / Termination / Truth) | P1 | &#39;src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/projections/projection-rebuild-service.ts&#39; | No shadow-build/compare/cutover protocol; §28.6 requires shadow projection → hash comparison → cutover → retention of the legacy rollback API with a stale marker | Fixed (source code patched and targeted tests added) | The root cause has two layers: first, before &#39;rebuildProjection()&#39;, only a one-time traversal was performed by calling handlers event by event, without creating versioned snapshots; second, the service layer completely lacked management of the three states—active/shadow/previous—so even if reconstruction were possible, there was no shadow build, hash comparison, cutover, or stale-marker protocol. | In this round, &#39;ProjectionSnapshot&#39;, &#39;ProjectionComparisonResult&#39;, &#39;shadowBuildProjection()&#39;, &#39;compareShadowProjection()&#39;, &#39;cutoverShadowProjection()&#39;, &#39;markProjectionStale()&#39;, and &#39;getProjectionSnapshotStatus()&#39; were added in &#39;src/platform/5-plane-state-evidence/projections/projection-rebuild-service.ts&#39;, and the main rebuild chain was switched to a true threaded &#39;accumulatedState&#39; before generating a &#39;stateHash&#39; snapshot. |定向验证已通过:&#39;tests/unit/platform/5-plane-state-evidence/projections/projection-rebuild-service.test.ts&#39; 新增 &#39;threads state across events&#39; 与 &#39;supports shadow build, compare, and cutover&#39;,证明影子投影、hash 比对、切换和旧版保留链可运行。 |
| R11-11 | 55. Orchestration of deep-level gaps in the plane (Evaluator / Observer / Budget / Termination / Truth) | P2 | &#39;src/platform/five-plane-execution/run-termination-cleanup.ts:65&#39; | Always returns complete:true regardless of whether the cleanup actually succeeds or fails; no partial-failure tracking or incident creation (§12 exception handling) | Fixed (source-code fix with regression test added) | The root cause breaks down into two layers: the old conclusion that “‘complete’ is always true” has been disproven by the current implementation, but the cleanup’s partial failure still lacks an incident escalation chain; this round closes the remaining gap by introducing an explicit incident escalation callback and writing the incident outcome back to the receipt. | Currently, &#39;src/platform/5-plane-execution/run-termination-cleanup.ts&#39; has added &#39;CleanupIncidentCallback&#39; and &#39;RunTerminationCleanupReceipt.incident&#39;, when &#39;cleanupStatus! When “complete” is triggered, an incident is created or escalated; ‘tests/unit/platform/reaudit/r16-31-r17-49-regressions.test.ts’ already covers the scenario where a partial cleanup failure generates incident evidence. | Close this item and no longer retain any remaining open balances under the “partial failure does not automatically trigger an incident” rule. |
| R11-12 | 55. Orchestration of Planar Deep Gaps (Evaluator / Observer / Budget / Termination / Truth) | P2 | &#39;src/platform/5-plane-state-evidence/truth/ (global)&#39; | No snapshot versioning; the worker-snapshot-repository uses a bare UPSERT without a version column/CAS/optimistic concurrency (§25.3/§25.10) | Fixed (source-code fix with additional targeted tests) | Root cause confirmed: previously, the worker snapshot write pipeline indeed lacked version comparison; the &#39;UPSERT&#39; would silently overwrite old values during concurrent updates. In this round, both the sync and async write paths have been switched to explicit optimistic CAS: a ‘version’ is persisted upon insertion, and during conflict-driven updates, writes are constrained via the `WHERE worker_snapshots.version = expectedVersion` condition; a `worker_snapshot.version_conflict` exception is thrown when a stale write is detected. | Currently, both &#39;src/platform/5-plane-state-evidence/truth/sqlite/repositories/worker-snapshot-repository.ts&#39; and &#39;src/platform/5-plane-state-evidence/truth/async-repositories/worker-repository.ts&#39; have incorporated &#39;version&#39; into queries and persistence, and added CAS conflict protection to &#39;upsertWorkerSnapshot()&#39;; targeted regression tests &#39;tests/integration/platform/5-plane-state-evidence/truth/worker-snapshot-cas-r11-12.test.ts&#39; and &#39;tests/unit/platform/5-plane-state-evidence/truth/worker-snapshot-version-cas.test.ts&#39; now cover initial writes, increments, and conflict rejections. | What’s being closed is the genuine gap in worker snapshots—namely, the lack of versioning and CAS. |
| R11-13 | 55. 编排平面深层缺口（Evaluator / Observer / Budget / Termination / Truth） | P2 | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/projections/workflow-run-projection.ts:196` | processedEventIds 无界数组+includes() O(n) 去重；长运行工作流内存/性能恶化；需 Set 或 watermark 去重 | 已解决（源码复核并补定向测试） | 根因是旧实现确实把 `processedEventIds` 当数组直接查重，长运行投影会出现 O(n) 去重和无界增长；现行实现后来已改成“序列化时保留数组、运行时转 `Set`”的双态模型，但 reaudit 文档没有跟上。 | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/projections/workflow-run-projection.ts` 已通过 `toInternalState()` 把 `processedEventIds` 转成 `_processedEventIdSet: Set<string>` 做 O(1) 查重，并在 `markEventProcessed()` 中对 `MAX_PROCESSED_EVENT_ID_SET_SIZE = 10_000` 执行 watermark eviction。现有 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/projections/workflow-run-projection.test.ts` 已覆盖基础去重，本轮新增的 `workflowRunProjectionHandler bounds processedEventIds with watermark eviction` 进一步验证了 10,050 个事件后集合仍被上限约束。 | 这是文档基线漂移，不再保留为未解决。 |

| R11-25 | 56. 交互子系统深层缺口（Wizard / Template / NL Pipeline / Dashboard） | P1 | `src/interaction/dashboard/metric-aggregator/index.ts` | §43.2-43.5 要求时序聚合/趋势/SLO 比较/域级分组；summarizeTaskMetrics 仅 4状态单快照计数无窗口/P50/P95/SLO gap | 已解决（源码/测试） | 原结论停留在 `summarizeTaskMetrics()` 仍是唯一入口的阶段；现行实现已经有 `aggregateWindowedMetrics()`、`calculateMetricTrend()`、`compareSloValue()`、`groupMetricsByDomain()`、`MetricAggregator` 与 `buildDashboardMetricsWithAggregation()`，只是 reaudit 没把这些能力和专项回归写回。 | 本轮新增 `tests/unit/interaction/dashboard/metric-aggregator/metric-aggregator.test.ts` 的 `buildDashboardMetricsWithAggregation returns window, trend, slo, and domain grouping`，直接验证 summary/window/SLO/domain/trend 五类输出；同文件与既有 advanced tests 一起通过。定向命令 `./node_modules/.bin/tsx --test tests/unit/interaction/dashboard/metric-aggregator.test.ts tests/unit/interaction/dashboard/metric-aggregator/metric-aggregator.test.ts` 已通过。 | 关闭的是“metric aggregator 仍只有单快照计数”的陈旧结论。 |
| R11-26 | 56. 交互子系统深层缺口（Wizard / Template / NL Pipeline / Dashboard） | P2 | `src/interaction/nl-gateway/ (ambiguity-handler vs disambiguation-handler)` | 重复 detectAmbiguity 函数(不同逻辑)从两个模块导出——import 冲突风险+行为不一致 | 已解决（源码修复） | 原问题已不在于两套逻辑并存，而在于 barrel 入口继续把 canonical 和 legacy wrapper 混在一起导出，容易误读成“双实现”。 | 本轮将 `src/interaction/nl-gateway/index.ts` 的 `detectAmbiguity` 统一指向 `disambiguation-handler` canonical source；`ambiguity-handler` 仅保留兼容入口，不再作为 barrel 主导出来源。 | 关闭“主导出面存在双逻辑冲突风险”的条目。 |
| R11-27 | 56. 交互子系统深层缺口（Wizard / Template / NL Pipeline / Dashboard） | P2 | `src/interaction/ux/onboarding/index.ts:310` | recommendDomains() 硬编码正则关键词匹配；§44.4 要求基于业务上下文的智能域推荐(LLM/用户历史/DomainRegistry) | 已解决（源码修复并补定向测试） | 根因是域推荐过去只看描述关键词，不消费用户模式和历史偏好。 | 本轮在 `src/interaction/ux/onboarding/index.ts` 的 `recommendDomains()` 中加入 `historicalDomainPreferences/userMode/requiresSso` 等上下文评分，并把原因链回写到 `PortalOnboardingPlan.recommendationReasons`；`tests/unit/interaction/ux/onboarding.test.ts` 已新增 history + executive 模式偏好回归。 | 关闭“域推荐完全不看业务上下文”的条目。 |
| R11-28 | 56. 交互子系统深层缺口（Wizard / Template / NL Pipeline / Dashboard） | P2 | `src/interaction/ux/onboarding/index.ts` | §44.5 要求 progressive disclosure(按用户模式隐藏复杂度)；buildVisualWorkflowBuilder/buildDomainOnboardingWizard 不按模式区分返回相同结构 | 已解决（源码修复并补定向测试） | 旧实现虽然已有文案差异，但结构层仍没有显式表达“哪些部分被隐藏/展开”；这才是审计真正指出的缺口。 | 本轮为 `DomainOnboardingWizard` 与 `VisualWorkflowBuilder` 增加 `progressiveDisclosure` 结构，按 `solo/team/department/enterprise` 输出不同的 `level/visibleSections/hiddenSections/defaultExpandedCategories`；`tests/unit/interaction/ux/onboarding.test.ts` 已覆盖 solo 和 enterprise 两端。 | 关闭“返回结构不区分用户模式”的条目。 |
| R11-29 | 56. 交互子系统深层缺口（Wizard / Template / NL Pipeline / Dashboard） | P2 | `src/interaction/dashboard/dashboard-websocket-server.ts:330-346` | performHeartbeat() 标记超时连接 isConnected=false 但不从 connections/subscribers 移除——无界内存增长+stale 推送 | 已解决（源码复核） | 根因是旧 heartbeat 清理只标记连接断开，不真正执行 unregister；现行实现已经改为先收集超时 client，再统一调用 `unregisterClient()` 清理连接和订阅映射，只是 reaudit 条目没有回写。 | 当前 `src/interaction/dashboard/dashboard-websocket-server.ts` 的 `performHeartbeat()` 已在超时分支收集 `timedOutClientIds` 并逐个调用 `unregisterClient()`；`unregisterClient()` 本身会同时移除 `connections`、`channelSubscribers` 和 metric 订阅。现有 `tests/unit/interaction/dashboard/dashboard-websocket-server.test.ts` 已包含 `heartbeat unregisters timed out clients (issue #2040 fixed)`、`performHeartbeat removes timed out connections from the registry` 和 `heartbeat cleanup removes timed out clients from counts and routing` 三条回归。 | 这条与后面的 `R23-14/2040` 是同一缺陷的重复挂账，现统一视为已解决。 |
| R11-30 | 57. 跨切面架构问题（错误处理 / 日志 / 类型安全 / 平面耦合） | P0 | `src/platform/five-plane-control-plane/incident-control/auto-stop-loss-service.ts:803` | executePlaybook() .catch(()=>{}) 静默吞没全部错误；健康事件期间 runbook 失败不可见——§9.6 要求分类+证据记录 | 已解决（源码复核并补定向测试） | 根因是旧实现的确存在 fire-and-forget 吞错路径；现行实现已经去掉了空 `catch`，并把“promise 级异常”和“playbook 内部 action 失败”分成两类可见出口：前者在异步 `catch` 中分类记录，后者以失败 `StopLossEvent` 留存在执行历史里。 | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-control-plane/incident-control/auto-stop-loss-service.ts` 的 `updateHealthCheck()` 已不再使用空 `catch`，而是对 `executePlaybook(...).catch(...)` 调用 `classifyPlaybookError(...)` + `recordError(...)`；同时 `executePlaybook()` 自身会把 action handler 失败收敛成带 `errorMessage` 的失败事件并写入 `executionHistory`。本轮新增 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-control-plane/incident-control/auto-stop-loss-service.test.ts` 的 `updateHealthCheck records failed execution event when async playbook action fails`，验证健康事件触发的异步 playbook 失败不会被吞掉，而会留存在执行历史中。 | 这次关闭的是“静默吞错导致失败不可见”的原问题，不额外宣称更强的 incident 编排能力已全部补齐。 |
| R11-31 | 57. 跨切面架构问题（错误处理 / 日志 / 类型安全 / 平面耦合） | P1 | `src/platform/shared/observability/structured-logger.ts:42-59` | StructuredLogEntry 缺 tenantId/harnessRunId；§7.1 要求每条日志含 traceId+spanId+tenantId+harnessRunId | 已解决 | 原条目已与现行类型不符。`StructuredLogEntry` 现在已显式包含 `tenantId` 与 `harnessRunId`，logger 还支持从显式字段或 `data` payload 提取这两个相关 ID。 | 当前 `src/platform/shared/observability/structured-logger.ts` 的 `StructuredLogEntry` 已定义 `tenantId?: string` 与 `harnessRunId?: string`；现有 `tests/unit/platform/shared/observability/structured-logger-extended.test.ts` 已验证从 payload 读取与显式字段覆盖，`tests/unit/platform/shared/observability/structured-logger-format.test.ts` 也已验证两字段格式化保留。 | 属于文档基线漂移，关闭。 |
| R11-32 | 57. 跨切面架构问题（错误处理 / 日志 / 类型安全 / 平面耦合） | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/stream-bridge.ts:147,251` | JSON.parse() as T 无 schema 验证在 inter-plane 边界；§5.2 要求所有平面间通信 schema-validated | 已解决（源码复核并补定向测试） | 原指控停留在更早的 `StreamBridge` 版本：当前实现已经不是 `JSON.parse() as T`，而是在两处反序列化后都走了 Zod 运行时校验；本轮补的缺口只是把这份现状重新写回 reaudit，并增加一个“非对象 payload 被收敛为空对象”的回归。 | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/stream-bridge.ts` 在 `mapEventType()` 使用 `taskStatusChangedPayloadSchema.safeParse(JSON.parse(event.payloadJson))`，在 `emitFromEvent()` 使用 `genericEventPayloadSchema.safeParse(JSON.parse(input.event.payloadJson))`，不再把 JSON 直接断言成业务类型；新增 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/stream-bridge.test.ts` 的 `StreamBridge drops non-object event payloads at the inter-plane boundary`，并在本轮定向命令中通过。 | 关闭陈旧结论；不宣称这里已经有比 `Record<string, unknown>` 更细的业务 payload contract。 |
| R11-33 | 57. 跨切面架构问题（错误处理 / 日志 / 类型安全 / 平面耦合） | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/channel-gateway-delivery-service.ts:540,698,746` | 三处 JSON.parse() as Record<string,unknown> 无运行时验证；DB payload_json 反序列化越过平面边界无校验 | 已修复 | 原始问题在主读取路径上其实早已开始收敛：`getPendingDeliveries()`、`getDeadLetters()`、`getRetryableMessages()` 都已经转成 `deliveryPayloadSchema.safeParse(...)`；但同文件里 `moveToDeadLetter()` 提取 `requestUrl` 仍残留一次裸 `JSON.parse`，导致“主链有校验、辅助链没统一”的边界漂移。 | 本轮新增 `parseDeliveryPayload()`，把 `src/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/channel-gateway-delivery-service.ts` 内所有 `payload_json` 读取统一收口到 `deliveryPayloadSchema.safeParse(JSON.parse(...))`；新增 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/channel-gateway-delivery-service.test.ts` 的 `getPendingDeliveries rejects non-object payload_json at the DB boundary`，证明数组类畸形 payload 不会穿透成业务对象，并在本轮定向命令中通过。 | 这次关闭的是“DB payload_json 读取未统一校验”的问题，不额外宣称 delivery payload 已有更严格的字段级 schema。 |
| R11-34 | 57. 跨切面架构问题（错误处理 / 日志 / 类型安全 / 平面耦合） | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/websocket-bridge.ts:135` | WS 消息 JSON.parse() as WebSocketMessageType 无 schema 验证；外部客户端输入在入口边界需运行时 schema 检查 | 已解决（源码复核） | 原条目没有跟上后续接线：当前 WebSocket 入口已经先做 JSON 解析，再用 `webSocketMessageSchema` 进行 discriminated-union 校验，失败时返回 `invalid_message`，不再把外部输入直接断言成 `WebSocketMessageType`。 | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/websocket-bridge.ts` 已定义 `webSocketMessageSchema`，在 `handleConnection()` 的 message handler 中对 `parsed` 执行 `webSocketMessageSchema.safeParse(parsed)` 后才进入 `handleMessage()`；现有 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/websocket-bridge-coverage.test.ts` 已包含 `WebSocketBridge handles invalid JSON gracefully` 用例，可直接对照这一入口行为。 | 关闭陈旧结论；本轮未把整份 websocket coverage 文件作为验证命令，因为该文件存在旧的异步收尾噪音，但源码与现有用例已足以反证原指控。 |
| R11-35 | 57. 跨切面架构问题（错误处理 / 日志 / 类型安全 / 平面耦合） | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/prompt-routes.ts:44` | schema.parse 后立即 payload as any 转交——验证产出的类型安全被 any 抹除；字段漂移静默通过 | 已修复 | 原条目命中的 `POST /v1/prompts` 路径其实早已是强类型 `readValidatedJsonBody(..., promptBundleRegistrationSchema.parse)`；真正残留的根因在同文件 `PUT /v1/prompts/:name/deprecate`，它仍走 `readJsonBody(...) as Record<string, unknown>` 旧路径，导致 deprecate body 没有独立 schema。 | 本轮在 `src/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/prompt-routes.ts` 新增 `promptBundleDeprecationSchema`，并把 `PUT /deprecate` 改成 `readValidatedJsonBody(ctx.request.body, promptBundleDeprecationSchema.parse)`，彻底去掉该分支的 `as Record<string, unknown>` 类型抹除；`tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/prompt-routes.test.ts` 新增 `PUT /v1/prompts/:name/deprecate validates request body before deprecating` 与 `... accepts validated payload`，并在本轮定向命令中通过。 | 这是实修，不是单纯改文档；同时也把该条的命中位置从过时的 `POST` 路径纠正到了真实残留分支。 |
| R11-36 | 57. 跨切面架构问题（错误处理 / 日志 / 类型安全 / 平面耦合） | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/lease/execution-lease-service-async.ts:502` | audit as any 在 lease audit 插入处抹除类型安全——执行平面与证据平面间类型合约断裂 | 已解决（源码复核） | 这条属于 reaudit 结论滞后：当前 async lease service 的审计写入入口已经显式收敛到 `LeaseAuditRecord`，不再有 `audit as any` 这种跨平面类型抹除。 | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/lease/execution-lease-service-async.ts` 通过 `private insertLeaseAudit(audit: LeaseAuditRecord): void` 统一写入，所有调用点都构造显式 `LeaseAuditRecord` 字面量；本轮同时校正并跑通了 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/lease/execution-lease-service-async-r9.test.ts` 与 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/lease/execution-lease-service-async.test.ts`，确认 async lease 主链仍按现行 TTL/审计语义工作。 | 关闭陈旧结论；本轮没有在这里新增生产代码，因为真实类型抹除点已经不存在。 |
| R11-37 | 57. 跨切面架构问题（错误处理 / 日志 / 类型安全 / 平面耦合） | P1 | `src/org-governance/org-model/hr-role-governance-service.ts:24` | 跨平面深度 import：org-governance 直接导入 platform/five-plane-execution/tool-executor/tool-recommend-service.ts 绕过 contracts 层 | 已解决（源码复核） | 根因不是当前源码仍在深度导入 `tool-recommend-service`，而是 reaudit 条目引用了更早期的 import 位置，后续重构把该依赖收敛成共享工具发现入口后，文档没有同步回写。 | 当前 `src/org-governance/org-model/hr-role-governance-service.ts:16-24` 只依赖 approval service、division loader 与 `../../platform/shared/tool-discovery/index.js` 的 `expandToolNames/inferPromotedToolNames`，并不存在对 `platform/five-plane-execution/tool-executor/tool-recommend-service.ts` 的直接导入。 | 不改生产代码，按现行源码关闭陈旧指控。 |
| R11-38 | 57. 跨切面架构问题（错误处理 / 日志 / 类型安全 / 平面耦合） | P1 | `src/platform/compliance/compliance-case-orchestration-service.ts:4` | Platform 平面导入 org-governance/compliance-engine/ 形成双向依赖——违反平面间单向依赖规则 | 已解决（源码复核） | 根因是原审计停留在 platform/compliance 仍直接引用 org-governance 实现类型的阶段；现行文件已改为在 platform 平面内声明最小 `ComplianceGovernanceEvaluator` 接口，由调用方注入实现，但 reaudit 结论没有刷新。 | 当前 `src/platform/compliance/compliance-case-orchestration-service.ts:16-27,60-80` 在本平面内定义 `ComplianceEvaluationResult` 和 `ComplianceGovernanceEvaluator` 最小接口，`options.governance` 只接受接口注入，不再直接 import `org-governance/compliance-engine/*`。 | 不改生产代码，按现行解耦状态关闭。 |
| R11-39 | 57. 跨切面架构问题（错误处理 / 日志 / 类型安全 / 平面耦合） | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/dashboard-routes.ts:14` | Platform API 层直接导入 interaction/ux/ 跨平面边界无 contract 接口 | 已解决（源码复核） | 根因是 reaudit 条目引用了旧的 dashboard 依赖关系；当前 API 层并没有直接接入 `interaction/ux`，而是依赖 platform/shared 下的 workbench 快照服务，历史指控未随重构更新。 | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/dashboard-routes.ts:10-19` 导入的是 `../../../shared/ux/platform-workbench-snapshot-service.js`、stability/compliance/prompt-engine 等 platform 内模块，没有 `interaction/ux/*` 直接依赖。 | 不改生产代码，关闭过时导入指控。 |
| R11-40 | 57. 跨切面架构问题（错误处理 / 日志 / 类型安全 / 平面耦合） | P1 | `src/platform/contracts/errors.ts` | 异常分类法缺 ResourceError/SecurityError/BusinessRuleError(§9.6 要求 transient/permanent/resource/security/business-rule 五类) | 已解决（源码复核） | 根因不是现行错误模型仍缺三类异常，而是 reaudit 条目基于旧版 `AppErrorCategory` 快照；后续扩展已补齐 category union 与对应错误类，但文档仍保持旧判断。 | 当前 `src/platform/contracts/errors.ts:15-32` 的 `AppErrorCategory` 已含 `resource`、`security`、`business-rule`，并在 `src/platform/contracts/errors.ts:459-503` 定义了 `ResourceError`、`SecurityError`、`BusinessRuleError` 三个具体错误类。 | 不改生产代码，回写现行错误分类体系。 |
| R11-41 | 57. 跨切面架构问题（错误处理 / 日志 / 类型安全 / 平面耦合） | P2 | `src/interaction/ux/ux-event-tracking-service.ts:122,136` | 双重 as any 转换使 UX 事件逃逸类型检查；分析管线可收到畸形数据 | 已修复 | 根因复核后比原条目更具体：当前文件里最显著的 `as any` 已不在原位置，但 `trackEvent()` 仍把 `payload.elementId` 和 `payload.interactionType` 通过隐式断言塞进 `UxEventTrack`，导致非字符串 `elementId` 和非法交互类型可以穿透到事件日志/发布链。 | 本轮在 `src/interaction/ux/ux-event-tracking-service.ts:86-95,131-194` 新增 `normalizeElementId()`、`normalizeInteractionType()` 与 `TrackEventPayload`，去掉残余不安全断言，改为把非字符串 `elementId` 收敛为 `null`、非法 `interactionType` 收敛为 `"click"`；`tests/unit/interaction/ux/ux-event-tracking-service-edge-cases.test.ts:92-112` 新增两条回归，并与同族 UX 测试一起定向通过 `94 passed / 0 failed / 0 skipped`。 | 真实改了生产代码并补了边界回归。 |
| R11-42 | 57. 跨切面架构问题（错误处理 / 日志 / 类型安全 / 平面耦合） | P2 | `src/domains/registry/plugin-spi-registry.ts:488` | .catch(()=>undefined) 静默丢弃 Promise rejection；插件超时原因丢失无日志/证据 | 已解决（源码复核） | 根因不是现行插件 SPI 仍在 activation/invocation 路径静默吞错，而是 reaudit 仍停留在更早期 fire-and-forget 认知；当前失败链已经统一收敛到 failure state、隔离事件和 invocation 完成事件，原指控所述“超时原因丢失无证据”已不成立。 | 当前 `src/domains/registry/plugin-spi-registry.ts:675-699` 的 `recordFailure()` 会落 `failureCount/lastErrorAt/lastErrorMessage` 并发布 `publishIsolationEvent(...)`；`src/domains/registry/plugin-spi-registry.ts:719-741` 的 invocation 主链会在失败时发布 `plugin:invocation_completed` 且 `status: "failed"`、携带 `reasonCode/errorMessage`。源码中未再保留原条目所述的 `.catch(()=>undefined)` 静默吞错分支。 | 不改生产代码，按现行可观测失败链关闭。 |
| R11-43 | 57. 跨切面架构问题（错误处理 / 日志 / 类型安全 / 平面耦合） | P2 | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus.ts:474,508,523` | 多处 .catch(()=>undefined/0) 使事件投递链失败对证据平面不可见；交付顺序错误无法追踪 | 已解决（源码复核） | 根因是 reaudit 条目没有跟上后续容错改造：当前 delivery 链在“允许吞错返回 0”的分支前，已经先把失败记录到结构化日志中，因此真实剩余行为是“容错返回值仍存在”，而不是“失败不可见”。 | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus.ts:1038-1058` 已在 volatile handler 失败时记录 `event_bus.volatile_delivery_failed` 与 `event_bus.volatile_delivery_chain_error`；`src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus.ts:1088-1115` 已在 durable delivery 链记录 `event_bus.delivery_chain_error`，并在 `swallowErrors` 分支返回 `0` 前记录 `event_bus.delivery_failed`。因此原条目指控的“无日志/证据可见性”已被后续实现消化。 | 不改生产代码；保留对当前容错语义的准确描述，但关闭“静默失败不可见”的旧问题。 |
| R11-44 | 57. 跨切面架构问题（错误处理 / 日志 / 类型安全 / 平面耦合） | P2 | `src/sdk/cli/stable-runner-factory.ts:166` | (runner as any)(runnerArgs) 擦除 runner 函数签名；参数合约不匹配仅运行时暴露 | 已修复 | 根因是 stable CLI 工厂为了兼容同步/异步 runner 和不同 report 形状，把 `runner`、`writer`、`failed` 都宽化成 `any`，再用 `(runner as any)(runnerArgs as any)` 调用，导致 entrypoint 参数漂移只能等运行时报错；移除这层擦除后，也暴露出 `stable-gate` / `stable-package` 在 `exactOptionalPropertyTypes` 下把 `undefined` 显式写入可选字段的真实调用端漂移。 | 本轮在 `src/sdk/cli/stable-runner-factory.ts:63-149` 用泛型 `StableRunner<RunnerArgs, Report>`、`StableReportWriter<Report>`、`FailedPredicate<Report>` 替换 `any`，移除 `(runner as any)(runnerArgs as any)`，补上 `defaultFailed(report: unknown)`；同时把 `src/sdk/cli/stable-gate.ts:15-21` 与 `src/sdk/cli/stable-package.ts:12-18` 改为条件展开 `evidenceRootDir`。`tests/unit/sdk/cli/stable-runner-factory.test.ts:19-31,251-260` 已补强强类型回归，相关定向测试通过 `94 passed / 0 failed / 0 skipped`，`npm run build` 也已通过。 | 真实修复类型签名擦除，并顺带收敛了被 build 暴露的调用端漂移。 |

| R12-01 | 60. 事件总线与流式基础设施深层缺陷 | P0 | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus.ts` | 无 partition-by-aggregate 排序保证；§7.3/§28.3 要求同聚合内 sequence 单调递增+分区 outbox；flat subscribers Map 无聚合分区 | 已解决（源码+回归） | 根因成立：旧总线只有 flat subscriber fan-out，没有按 partition/aggregate 做单调序列和 FIFO 投递。 | 本轮在 `durable-event-bus.ts` 增加了分区序列跟踪与 `pendingPartitionEvents` 队列，`publish()`/投递路径改为按 partition FIFO 出队；并引入本地单调 sequence 兜底，保证同 partition 内事件顺序稳定。定向命令 `./node_modules/.bin/tsx --test tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus-partitioned-aggregate-order.test.ts tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/review-contract-regressions.test.ts` 已通过。 | 关闭“同聚合无顺序保证、无分区队列”的缺口。 |
| R12-02 | 60. 事件总线与流式基础设施深层缺陷 | P0 | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus.ts` | 无 consumer group 隔离；§7.3 要求 EventInbox.consumeOnce per consumer；所有订阅者同等处理无独立 offset/优先级/组级 circuit-breaker | 已解决（源码+回归） | 旧实现把所有订阅者放在统一 fan-out 路径里，缺少 group 级隔离与独立并发控制。 | 当前 `durable-event-bus.ts` 已显式维护 consumer group 视图与组级并发/积压状态，订阅注册包含 `groupId`，投递时按组隔离选择消费者，不再是所有订阅者共用一条无差别通道。定向命令 `./node_modules/.bin/tsx --test tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus-consumer-group-isolation.test.ts tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/review-contract-regressions.test.ts` 已通过。 | 关闭的是“consumer group 完全无隔离”的问题。 |
| R12-03 | 60. 事件总线与流式基础设施深层缺陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus.ts` | DLQ 仅日志无持久队列；§28.8 要求 DLQ 含 category/reason/retry_count/operator_action_log+inspect/redrive/discard with approval | 已解决（源码+回归） | 旧实现的真实缺口是重试耗尽后只记日志，不把失败事件落入权威持久层。 | 当前 `durable-event-bus.ts` 在重试耗尽后会构造 dead-letter record；若未显式注入 `dlqRepository`，也会回退写入 authoritative store 的 dead-letter 持久层，而不是只打印日志。现有回归集 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/review-contract-regressions.test.ts` 已覆盖 dead-letter 合同，相关事件总线定向集已通过。 | 关闭“DLQ 仅日志、无持久落盘”的核心缺口。 |
| R12-04 | 60. 事件总线与流式基础设施深层缺陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus.ts`; `src/platform/shared/observability/runtime-metrics-registry.ts` | Polling 10ms 硬编码无 back-pressure；§9.2 要求 queue-depth graduated back-pressure(reject low priority→DLQ→incident) | 已解决（针对本条具体缺口） | 原问题指向的是固定 10ms polling 与完全缺失的 queue-depth back-pressure。 | 当前 `durable-event-bus.ts` 已移除硬编码 10ms 轮询，新增基于 queue depth 的自适应 polling interval 计算，并在 `runtime-metrics-registry.ts` 增加 `recordEventBackpressure(...)` 指标上报。定向命令 `./node_modules/.bin/tsx --test tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus-backpressure-2297.test.ts tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/review-contract-regressions.test.ts` 已通过。边界说明：本轮关闭的是“固定 polling、无 back-pressure”这一本条缺口，不额外宣称 incident 自动化编排已经全部实现。 | 关闭的是本条审计指控的 concrete bug。 |
| R12-05 | 60. 事件总线与流式基础设施深层缺陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/transactional-event-appender.ts:96` | 手动 BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK 绕过 db.transaction() wrapper；嵌套事务冲突风险(§25.2 原子 truth+event 保证) | 已解决（源码复核并补现行证据） | 原审计结论已明显滞后：当前 `TransactionalEventAppender` 的 `appendEvent()` 与 `appendEvents()` 都已经走 `db.transaction(...)` 包装，不再手写 `BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK`；同时还提供 `mutateTruth` hook，把 truth mutation、event append 和 outbox 写入纳入同一事务。 | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/transactional-event-appender.ts` 现行实现中，`appendEvent()` / `appendEvents()` 都在 `db.transaction(...)` 内执行，且 `options.mutateTruth?.(this.db)` 也在同一事务闭包内；`tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/transactional-event-appender.test.ts` 已覆盖 transaction wrapper、truth mutation 原子提交与 truth mutation 抛错时整体回滚。 | 关闭的是“手写事务绕过 wrapper”这条旧指控；不外推整个 durable event bus 深层项都已完成。 |
| R12-06 | 60. 事件总线与流式基础设施深层缺陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/dlq-service.ts:112` | DLQ 纯内存 Map；进程重启丢失全部死信；§28.8 要求持久化 DLQ+redrive 支持 | 已修复（源码修复并补定向测试） | 根因不是仓里完全没有持久化 DLQ，而是 `SqliteDlqRepository` 已存在的情况下，`DlqService` 默认构造仍会在调用方漏注入持久仓时静默退回 `InMemoryDlqRepository`，把“可持久化能力”变成“默认仍会重启丢数”。 | 本轮将 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/dlq-service.ts` 改为 fail-closed：生产态必须显式提供 `DlqRepository` 或 `dbConnection`，否则抛 `dlq.persistence_required`；SQLite 路径继续经 `SqliteDlqRepository` 持久化并保留 `listRetryable()` redrive 能力。新增 `tests/integration/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/dlq-persistence.integration.test.ts`，验证 dead-letter 记录在数据库关闭并重新打开后仍可读取；`tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/dlq-service.test.ts` 也新增了“非测试态拒绝内存回退”的回归。 | 这是对默认丢数路径的实修，不是只补 warning。 |
| R12-07 | 60. 事件总线与流式基础设施深层缺陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/websocket-bridge.ts:269` | WS broadcast 无 back-pressure；不检查 buffered amount/send queue depth；慢客户端造成服务端内存无界增长 | 已解决（源码复核并补定向测试） | 原审计停留在 bridge 还只是“裸 `ws.send()` 广播”的早期形态；现行实现已经在发送前检查 `bufferedAmount`，对慢消费者发 `backpressure_warning`，并在高水位时跳过 `status_changed/progress/message_delta` 这类可丢低价值事件。 | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/websocket-bridge.ts` 已使用 `SLOW_CONSUMER_BUFFER_BYTES`、`slowConsumers`、`backpressure_warning` 和 `client.pendingAcks/bufferedEventCount` 做发送前背压分流。 | 定向验证已通过：既有 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/websocket-bridge-coverage.test.ts` 的 `tracks slow consumers` 继续通过，证明背压检测与慢客户端标记真实生效。 |
| R12-08 | 60. 事件总线与流式基础设施深层缺陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/websocket-bridge.ts:77` | WS 无 last_event_id resume/replay；§7 要求断连重连+从 last_event_id 恢复+stream_gap 事件；客户端丢事件 | 已修复（源码修复并补定向测试） | 根因是旧 bridge 虽然有 `lastEventId` 和 `stream_gap` 类型定义，但只把它们用于单连接内的 ack 顺序校验，没有任何任务级 replay buffer，也不会在重连订阅时消费 `last_event_id`。 | 本轮在 `src/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/websocket-bridge.ts` 增加 `taskEventHistory`、`MAX_TASK_EVENT_HISTORY`、`replayMissedEvents()`、`recordTaskEvent()` 和 `subscribe.lastEventId` / URL `last_event_id` 支持；重连时能从最近历史回放遗漏事件，找不到锚点时会显式发送 `stream_gap`。 | 定向验证已通过：`tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/websocket-bridge-coverage.test.ts` 新增 `replays missed task updates from last_event_id on reconnect` 与 `emits stream_gap when last_event_id is no longer replayable`。 |
| R12-09 | 60. 事件总线与流式基础设施深层缺陷 | P2 | `src/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/stream-bridge.ts:379` | Replay buffer 满时 splice(0,1) 丢最老帧不论类型——可丢 completed/failed/approval_requested 关键事件 | 已解决（实现已存在，本轮补回归证据） | 真实根因是早期实现确实按“最老优先”直接裁剪 replay buffer；后续源码已改成“只淘汰可丢事件”，但 reaudit 文档还停留在旧结论，没有补出现行实现和回归测试依据。 | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/stream-bridge.ts` 的 `appendToReplayBuffer()` 会优先定位并删除 `status_changed/progress/message_delta`，保留 `completed/failed/approval_requested` 等关键帧；本轮新增 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/stream-bridge-replay-buffer-regression.test.ts`，直接验证 buffer 超限时仍保留 `completed` 与 `approval_requested`。 | 这是文档纠偏而不是新造“假修复”；关闭依据来自现行实现和新增窄回归测试。 |
| R12-10 | 60. 事件总线与流式基础设施深层缺陷 | P2 | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/projections/ (全部 7文件)` | idempotency 用 Array.includes() O(n)+无界增长；需 Set 或 watermark 去重(§28.6 高效可重建) | 已解决（补齐剩余 projection 并补一致性测试） | 根因复核后比原条目更细：并非所有 projection 都完全停留在 `Array.includes()`，而是前几轮修复后出现了两类残留问题。`approval-queue/incident/workflow-run` 已切到 Set 或等价内部结构；但 `artifact-catalog/governance/risk-action/worker-status/tool-usage/workflow-timeline` 里存在“上层状态已声明 Set、底层 helper/测试仍沿用旧数组语义”的半迁移状态，导致文档与实现不一致、个别文件还留有重复旧 helper。 | 本轮清理并统一了 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/projections/{artifact-catalog,governance,risk-action,worker-status,tool-usage,workflow-timeline}-projection.ts` 的去重实现，现行 idempotency 均走 `Set.has()` / `new Set(...)`；新增 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/projections/projection-contract-alignment.test.ts`，并更新上述 projection 的单测，验证 `processedEventIds` 为 Set 且重复事件不会重复计数。 | 关闭的是“这批 projection 仍靠 `Array.includes()` 做去重”的真实缺口；不把它外推成 durable event bus 其他深层项已全部完成。 |
| R12-11 | 60. 事件总线与流式基础设施深层缺陷 | P2 | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/projections/ (全部 7文件)` | 无 freshness/stale 元数据；§28.6/§25.5 要求投影暴露 lastProjectedAt/lagMs/stale 标志 | 已解决（补齐剩余 projection 并补一致性测试） | 根因与 `R12-10` 同源：文档把所有 projection 一概判成“完全没有 freshness”，但现状其实是部分 projection 已有 `lastProjectedAt/lagMs/stale`，剩余文件则处于“类型声明、实现、测试不同步”的半修状态，导致复核时很难直接证明该 contract 已闭环。 | 现行 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/projections/{artifact-catalog,governance,risk-action,worker-status,tool-usage,workflow-timeline}-projection.ts` 都会在每次投影时调用 freshness 计算，写入 `lastProjectedAt/lagMs/stale`；`tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/projections/projection-contract-alignment.test.ts` 新增了过期事件用例，直接断言 old event 会被标成 `stale=true` 且暴露 `lagMs`。 | 本条关闭的是 projection freshness contract 的剩余落差；不外推事件总线整体可观测性已经无缺口。 |
| R12-12 | 60. 事件总线与流式基础设施深层缺陷 | P2 | `src/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/channel-gateway-service.ts:162,410,434,794` | 仅支持 3协议(telegram/slack/webhook)硬编码；§6 要求可插拔协议适配器注册表+协议翻译层 | 已解决（源码已满足，本轮补证据） | 原审计把“当前内置只有 telegram/slack/webhook 三个 adapter”误写成“系统只能硬编码三协议”。现行实现已经抽出了 `ChannelAdapter` 接口、`ChannelAdapterRegistry`、默认 registry 构造器和依 registry 路由的 delivery path，新协议可以通过注册 adapter 扩展，而不是改核心 service 分支。 | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/channel-gateway-service.ts` 已定义 `ChannelAdapter`/`ChannelAdapterRegistry`，`createDefaultChannelAdapterRegistry()` 注册内置 adapter，`ChannelGatewayService` 构造时接收可选自定义 registry，并在 `deliverResolvedTarget()` 中通过 `adapterRegistry.get(channel)` 分发。定向测试 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/channel-gateway-service-coverage.test.ts` 的 `ChannelGatewayService constructor accepts custom adapter registry`、`ChannelAdapterRegistry register and get adapter`、`ChannelAdapterRegistry throws on duplicate channel registration`、`createDefaultChannelAdapterRegistry includes telegram, slack, and webhook adapters` 已通过。 | 不伪称“协议翻译层已支持无限协议”；关闭的是“没有可插拔注册表、只能硬编码改核心 service”的旧指控。 |
| R12-13 | 61. 安全模型深层缺陷（Sandbox / PDP / Secret / Command） | P0 | `src/platform/five-plane-control-plane/iam/policy-engine.ts:434-447` | full-auto 模式对所有风险类别(含 destructive/irreversible/prod_affecting)直接放行；§10.1 要求 deny-by-default+高风险强制升级 | 已解决（源码已满足，本轮补证据） | 原审计停留在旧的 full-auto 直放语义；现行引擎已经把 `destructive/irreversible/prod_affecting` 视为 deny-by-default 高风险，即便在 `full-auto` 下也必须升级审批，而不会直接放行。 | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-control-plane/iam/policy-engine.ts` 在 `full-auto` 分支下会对高风险类别走 `policy.full_auto_high_risk_escalation`；定向测试 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-control-plane/iam/policy-engine.test.ts` 的 `PolicyEngine.evaluate escalates destructive action in full-auto mode` 与 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-control-plane/iam/iam-policy-engine-validation.test.ts` 的 `PolicyEngine escalates destructive actions even in full-auto mode` 已通过。 | 不重复宣称本轮新改生产逻辑，回写现行 deny-by-default 证据。 |
| R12-14 | 61. 安全模型深层缺陷（Sandbox / PDP / Secret / Command） | P0 | `src/platform/five-plane-control-plane/iam/sandbox-policy.ts:451-458,504-512,572-581` | restricted_exec 模式跳过路径边界检查(containsPathTraversalOutside 被豁免)；任意路径(/etc/shadow 等)通过验证(§10.3 filesystem jail) | 已解决（源码已满足，本轮补证据） | 这条已经不是现状。当前 `restricted_exec` policy 仍然有 `allowedRoots`，`checkSandboxPath()` 在 raw path 与 realpath 两个阶段都执行 `containsPathTraversalOutside(...)`，不再给 `restricted_exec` 任何路径边界豁免。顺带复核时还发现旧单测仍保留“restricted_exec 可越界”的历史断言，本轮一并改成现行 fail-close 语义。 | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-control-plane/iam/sandbox-policy.ts` 在第 2/6 步都对越界路径返回 `sandbox.path_outside_allowed_roots`，`createRestrictedExecPolicy()` 也继续绑定工作区根；定向测试 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-control-plane/iam/sandbox-policy.test.ts` 的 `checkSandboxPath restricted_exec mode still enforces allowed root boundary` 与 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-control-plane/iam/sandbox-policy-modes.test.ts` 的 `restricted_exec still enforces allowed-root checks and denied roots` 已通过。 | 关闭的是“restricted_exec 豁免 filesystem jail”的过期结论，不假称本轮新增了另一个隔离层。 |

| R12-19 | 61. 安全模型深层缺陷（Sandbox / PDP / Secret / Command） | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-control-plane/iam/vault-http-secret-provider.ts:202-239` | 静态 Vault token 缓存任意 1h TTL 无实际过期验证；已撤销 token 继续使用长达 1小时 | 已解决（源码已满足，本轮补证据） | 原审计指向的是旧的长 TTL 缓存语义；现行实现已经把无 lease 的静态 token 缓存压到 30 秒，并把 AppRole 在缺少 `lease_duration` 时的兜底 TTL 收紧到 60 秒，而不是继续默认 1 小时。 | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-control-plane/iam/vault-http-secret-provider.ts` 在 static token fallback 上设置 `_tokenExpiry = Date.now() + 30_000`，AppRole 无 lease 时只给 60 秒保守 TTL；定向测试 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-control-plane/iam/vault-http-secret-provider.test.ts` 的 `VaultHttpSecretProvider caches static token for only 30 seconds` 已通过。 | 不伪称“支持即时吊销回调”；关闭的是“静态 token 继续缓存 1h”的原始缺口。 |
| R12-20 | 61. 安全模型深层缺陷（Sandbox / PDP / Secret / Command） | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-control-plane/iam/network-egress-policy.ts:220-236,256-338,420-445` | Egress 默认 audit_only 模式——blocked destination 决策仍返回 allowed:true；无显式 env 配置时 egress 从不实际阻断 | 已解决（源码已满足，本轮补证据） | 原审计的两个前提都已失效：现行 env loader 与 service 默认 mode 都是 `deny`，不是 `audit_only`；同时 `evaluate()` 对 blocked/internal 目标返回的 decision fact 也是 `allowed:false`，`audit_only` 只影响 fetch wrapper 是否继续放行，不再篡改判定事实。 | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-control-plane/iam/network-egress-policy.ts` 默认 mode 为 `deny`，`evaluate()` 对内部地址、blocked type/domain、allowlist 未命中都返回 `allowed:false`，`createPolicyAwareFetch()` 仅在 `audit_only` 下记录后继续。定向测试 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-control-plane/iam/network-egress-policy.test.ts` 的 `NetworkEgressPolicyService audit_only mode logs but does not block` 与 `createPolicyAwareFetch audit_only mode records blocked decision but still allows request` 已通过。 | 不夸大为“全量网络层拦截已经部署到 OS 层”；关闭的是“默认 audit_only + blocked 仍 allowed:true”的过期指控。 |

Scale-Ecosystem 深层缺口（Federation / Multi-Region / Tenant / Marketplace） | P2 | `src/scale-ecosystem/tenant-platform/` | tenant-scoped quota 从不在 tenant-platform 中检查；创建 workspace/namespace/binding 无资源配额限制 | 已解决（源码/测试） | 根因已不再成立：tenant-platform 当前在创建 deployment binding、data namespace 等关键资源前都会执行 quota 准入。 | 当前 `src/scale-ecosystem/tenant-platform/tenant-platform-service.ts` 在 `createWorkspace()/createTenant()/createDeploymentBinding()/createDataNamespace()` 中都接入了 `enforceQuota()`；本轮补了 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/tenant-platform/tenant-platform-service.test.ts`，既验证允许路径会记录 `concurrent_connections/storage` 使用量，也验证超额时会 fail-close 拒绝 namespace 创建。 | 关闭该条 tenant-scoped quota 未检查缺口。 |

| R14-01 | §70 Incident/SLO/Reliability 深层缺陷 | P0 | `platform-panic/` | 无 Platform Panic 实现——仅有 "panic_stop" 字符串枚举，无实际传播/状态保存/恢复协议(§60 要求 cascade halt+PanicAcknowledgment+dual-admin PlatformResumeDirective) | 已修复（源码补齐返回一致性并补定向验证） | 原审计已明显滞后：`PlatformPanicService`、`PanicPropagationService`、`PlatformResumeDirective` 与双人确认类型实际都已存在；本轮复核又发现一个真实残留 bug：`cascadeHalt()` 虽会把 P1 更新为 `halted` 并持久到 `haltingLog`，但返回值仍是更新前的旧数组快照，导致调用方拿到的首平面状态与内部记录不一致。 | 本轮将 `src/platform/ops-maturity/platform-panic/panic-propagation-service.ts` 的 `cascadeHalt()` 改为返回已更新的 halting log，并新增 `tests/unit/platform/ops-maturity/platform-panic/panic-propagation-service.test.ts`，验证 cascade halt、PanicAcknowledgment、propagation record 和 dual-admin resume directive 全链都可运行。 | 关闭的是“无实际传播协议”这条旧指控与返回快照不一致的真实 bug，不外推 Incident/SLO 全域条目都已完成。 |
| R14-02 | §70 Incident/SLO/Reliability 深层缺陷 | P0 | `incident-detector.ts` | Incident severity 用 p1-p4 非 SEV1-4(§12.2)；与 runbook priority P0-P3 混淆无映射 | 已解决（源码复核） | 该条已被现行实现推翻：incident detector 当前直接使用统一 `SEV1-4` 严重度，而非旧的 `p1-p4`。 | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-control-plane/incident-control/incident-detector.ts` 的 `UnifiedSeverity` / `IncidentStatus` 均按 `SEV1-4` 与统一事件模型工作；reaudit 这里是文档基线滞后。 | 回写现行 severity 合同，不改生产代码。 |

| R14-04 | §70 Incident/SLO/Reliability 深层缺陷 | P1 | `incident-control/` | 无 post-mortem 自动化(§12.5/§60.3 要求 72h 内 Post-Incident Report) | 已解决（源码复核） | 该条已被现行 resolver 推翻：72 小时 post-mortem 触发门和自动生成入口都已存在。 | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-control-plane/incident-control/incident-resolver.ts` 已定义 `POST_MORTEM_AUTO_TRIGGER_HOURS = 72`，并提供 `isPostMortemDue()`、`generatePostMortem()`。 | 回写现行 post-mortem 自动化证据，不改生产代码。 |
| R14-05 | §70 Incident/SLO/Reliability 深层缺陷 | P1 | `incident-detector.ts` | 仅检测 p1/p2 两级；§12.3 定义 5条规则映射 SEV1-3 含自动动作；无可配置规则引擎 | 已解决（源码复核） | 该条已过时：当前 detector 已包含面向 `SEV1-3` 的 5 条默认检测规则，不再只有两级 incident。 | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-control-plane/incident-control/incident-detector.ts` 已导出 `DEFAULT_DETECTION_RULES`，覆盖 5 条 `SEV1-3` 检测规则，并在 detector 构造器中作为可替换规则集接入。 | 回写现行 rule engine / default rules 证据，不改生产代码。 |
